title_variants: River‑front mezzanine flat with free parking
Ground‑floor + mezzanine, steps to Kelham bars
Stylish factory‑converted flat with river views
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Enjoy a stylish, factory‑converted ground‑floor flat right in the heart of Kelham Island, where original industrial features meet modern comfort. Floor‑to‑ceiling windows frame sweeping views of the River Don and Ball Street Bridge, and the ducks even glide up to the glass. The open‑plan living area flows into a fully equipped kitchen and dining space, perfect for group meals or a quick coffee before heading out. 

The main bedroom on the ground floor offers a double bed, while a sleek mezzanine upstairs provides a second double bedroom and a cozy double futon at the far end, ideal for extra guests or flexible sleeping arrangements. Please note the mezzanine ladder is steep and the arches require a duck‑under – the central area gives full standing height. 

Step outside and you’re a five‑minute walk from Kelham’s buzzing bars, restaurants, the famed Yellow Arch Studios, and local breweries. The award‑winning Sardinian restaurant Domo is just around the corner. A dedicated parking space sits on the premises, with additional paid street parking nearby. 

The flat is self‑check‑in via lockbox, features fast Wi‑Fi, a workspace, TV, heating, and a full suite of safety devices. It’s an acoustic‑friendly space, so feel free to enjoy music or a quiet night in. Perfect for up to six guests seeking urban excitement and easy access to the Peak District.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the Living Room image with the river view as the cover photo – it instantly showcases the standout river panorama and spacious feel.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £222.7 is +112% above the city median (£104.9) while your 90‑day occupancy is only 48.9%, matching the median – a clear price‑to‑occupancy mismatch.
You have 0 reviews after 1 year of hosting; lack of social proof is likely suppressing bookings.
The current title "Stunning mezzanine flat" omits high‑value differentiators like river views, free parking, and the mezzanine layout.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is £222.7 – more than double the city median of £104.9, yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at the same 48.9%, indicating a clear pricing‑occupancy gap you can close.
